summary: Session 2 of 2 (UAT, screenshot, and release): authored the per-set ad-hoc UAT checklist to the Set 078/079/080 bar (5 walks; literal source-re-grounded strings; fresh suite counts quoted per walk: Set 081 S1 grep 12/12, build matrix 7/7, restoreGsState 26/26, writeBudgetYaml 3/3, full Layer-2 1265/0, tsc clean; every non-judgment functional item carries ProgrammaticVerification; two REAL cold-start Builds, one per sub-option, asserting the budget.yaml write matrix per L-079-3). Operator walked it clean: all 6 functional/judgment items PASS. The one 'Other' finding (the 'Build project structure' button read as belonging to the last sub-option row) was remediated CSS-only in-session -- one tree.css rule closes BOTH sub-choice groups (border-bottom + margin-bottom; the Lightweight verification group had the identical class of issue, L-069-1) -- and the operator re-checked against a rebuilt VSIX; the resolution is recorded inline in the checklist's Other row per the Set 080 attribution precedent. Operator captured the refreshed getting-started.png. Advisory end-of-set path-aware critique produced via the first-party pull_critique producer (openai:gpt-5.4 + google:gemini-2.5-pro over the repo-root sandbox with the whole-set diff exposed): BOTH arms VERIFIED, zero findings; artifact saved raw. Release prep: extension bumped 0.37.0 (package.json + package-lock.json -- the lockfile had silently sat at 0.34.0 through two releases; npm version realigned it), CHANGELOG 0.37.0 entry, repository-reference updated with honest publish-pending phrasing (L-078-1) to flip to Published after the operator-preauthorized tag push.
verification_notes: Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius: cross-artifact+index; multi-module {docs, tools}; breadth 10 files >= 4; build-ci-config: package.json + package-lock.json). Cross-provider verification on gpt-5-4 (openai; orchestrator claude/anthropic): VERIFIED in round 1, no blocking findings. Two NITS (non-blocking per L-071-1, no remediation round opened): (1) the evidence prose said the lockfile went 0.36.0->0.37.0 when the diff shows 0.34.0->0.37.0 -- a write-up slip, the file change itself is correct (the lockfile version had drifted through the 0.35.0/0.36.0 releases and is now realigned); (2) the divider remediation + operator re-check was recorded in prose/activity-log but not inline in the checklist -- addressed post-verdict by appending the attributed resolution note to the checklist's Other row (Set 080 precedent). Raw output in s2-verification.md, never edited. Evidence bundle included the complete unfiltered working-tree diff AND git status --short so the untracked checklist was visible (L-064-9); the S1 cost lesson held (round 1 cost $0.19 vs S1's $0.60 overcorrection).

reason.specifics: Routed ai-assignment recommendation (gemini-pro analysis, authored at S1): the next session set will likely revert to complex implementation work requiring a more capable model.
